creator: ports@bsdserwis.com
text:
Created attachment 176257
ssp-1.0 update

There is new version of net/self-service-password. The project is still running on ltd-project.org site. So tarball should be downloaded from this site, not form github (I've got some email discussion with SSP author).

So there is a patch which covers new version, correct download site and distname.

This was tested with poudriere. You can see logfile: There is new version of net/self-service-password.

portlint has only warining because of hyphens in portname:
WARN: Makefile: using hyphen in PORTNAME. consider using PKGNAMEPREFIX and/or PKGNAMESUFFIX.
0 fatal errors and 1 warning found.
